name: Baked Chicken Breasts with Almond Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 Ounce Canned Mushrooms, Stems and Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt both sides of the chicken breast halves with garlic salt.
2. Dip in melted butter to which paprika and lemon juice have been added.
3. Place in a shallow baking dish.
4. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
5. Mix remaining ingredients (mushrooms, Worcestershire sauce, sherry, almonds, almond extract) listed above and spoon over chicken breasts.
6. Sprinkle with slivered almonds.
7. Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Remove chicken; thicken sauce with 2 Tablespoons flour and stir in 1/4 cup fat-free sour cream (not counted).
9. Serve chicken breasts over rice.
You can use boneless breasts and reduce cooking time to 15 minutes, add other ingredients and cook another 15 minutes, then thicken the sauce and serve over rice. The counts will be lower if you serve this over rice. This recipe is wonderful - very moist with a great flavor.
